steps.title: Separate variable and fixed time
steps.content: In $W(x)=3x+45$, the term $3x$ changes with the number of shrubs. The constant term is the fixed time that does not depend on shrubs.

steps.title: Identify the mowing time
steps.content: Mowing the grass is the fixed part of the total time, so it is represented by the constant term $45$. The answer is 45.
